ul.li: Namespace Latency: Context switching between NetNS and Host adds negligible (~10-20µs) overhead.
Memory Impact: glibc resolution caches file handles internally; /etc/resolv.conf is checked for mtime changes.

ol.li: NSSwitch Configuration: /etc/nsswitch.conf determines if files or dns is checked first.
Socket Timeout: Default UDP timeout is 5s (managed by RES_TIMEOUT in glibc).
Conntrack Exhaustion: High-frequency DNS queries can fill the host nf_conntrack table, leading to dropped packets at Step 9/12.

ul.li: MTU Mismatch: DNS responses over 1500 bytes (rare) might be dropped if host/container MTUs don't match.
Loops: Search domains in Step 3 can cause N+1 queries for every single resolution.

div.p: Chain: MASQUERADE State: New/Established Map: 10.200.0.2 -> Host_IP
